title: Why did the policeman ask the writer to come to the police station?

meanings.usage: 用于攀爬高处，如爬墙或修缮房屋
指花园中存放工具的小房子
形容用讽刺的语气说话，常带有贬义
指打断某人说话或正在做的事
表示对已做的事感到后悔
用于引出好的结果或运气好的情况
按门时发出的铃声，用来通知屋内的人
指说话时的态度或语气
表示非常接近但未完全达到
形容人正在忙着做某事
用于表达在两个选项中更喜欢哪一个
指出于某种原因大声说话
用于对问题或陈述作出回应

examples.en: I tried to wake up my wife by ringing the doorbell.
examples.zh: 我按门铃试图叫醒我的妻子。

examples.en: The alarm clock woke me up at six.
examples.zh: 闹钟六点把我叫醒了。

examples.en: I got a ladder and put it against the wall.
examples.zh: 我拿了梯子把它靠在墙上。

examples.en: He put the ladder against the tree.
examples.zh: 他把梯子靠在树上。

examples.en: I looked down and nearly fell off the ladder.
examples.zh: 我向下看，差点从梯子上摔下来。

examples.en: She looked down at her feet.
examples.zh: 她低头看着自己的脚。

examples.en: I nearly fell off the ladder when I saw a policeman.
examples.zh: 我看到警察时差点从梯子上摔下来。

examples.en: The book fell off the table.
examples.zh: 书从桌子上掉了下来。

phrases.usage: 用于礼貌请求，后跟动名词

examples.en: Would you mind coming with me to the station?
examples.zh: 你介意跟我去一趟警察局吗？

examples.en: Would you mind opening the window?
examples.zh: 你介意打开窗户吗？

examples.en: I'd prefer to stay here.
examples.zh: 我更想留在这里。

examples.en: I prefer to read books at home.
examples.zh: 我更喜欢在家里读书。

examples.en: The policeman had started to climb towards me.
examples.zh: 警察已经开始向我爬过来。

examples.en: She started to cry when she heard the news.
examples.zh: 听到这个消息她开始哭了起来。

examples.en: She was fast asleep.
examples.zh: 她睡得很熟。

examples.en: The children are fast asleep.
examples.zh: 孩子们都睡得很熟。

examples.en: The policeman answered in the same tone.
examples.zh: 警察用同样的语气回答。

examples.en: He said in the same tone.
examples.zh: 他用同样的语气说道。

examples.en: My wife opened the window.
examples.zh: 我的妻子打开了窗户。

examples.en: It's hot here. Can you open the window?
examples.zh: 这里很热。你能打开窗户吗？

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻或某一段时间正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述故事发生的背景，或表示过去的某个时刻正在进行的动作

examples.en: I was climbing towards the bedroom window.
examples.zh: 我正在向卧室窗户攀爬。

examples.en: She was sleeping when I came home.
examples.zh: 我回家时她正在睡觉。

examples.en: The policeman was standing below the ladder.
examples.zh: 警察正站在梯子下面。

grammar.title: when引导的并列句 (when-Compound Sentence)
grammar.definition: when引导的并列句表示一个动作突然发生，常用过去时
grammar.structure: 过去进行时 + when + 一般过去时
grammar.usage: when在并列句中表示'就在这时'，when前的分句用过去进行时，when后的分句用一般过去时

examples.en: I was almost there when a voice said.
examples.zh: 我快要到的时候，一个声音响起。

examples.en: I was reading when the phone rang.
examples.zh: 我正在看书时电话响了。

examples.en: She was cooking when the doorbell rang.
examples.zh: 她正在做饭时门铃响了。

grammar.title: would you mind + 动名词 (Polite Requests)
grammar.definition: 用于礼貌地提出请求，询问对方是否介意做某事
grammar.usage: 是一种非常礼貌的请求方式，回答时通常表示不介意或委婉拒绝

examples.en: Would you mind coming with me to the station?
examples.zh: 你介意跟我去一趟警察局吗？

examples.en: Would you mind opening the door?
examples.zh: 你介意开门吗？

examples.en: Would you mind waiting here for a moment?
examples.zh: 你介意在这里等一会儿吗？

sentencePatterns.pattern: I was + 动词-ing when + 主语 + 动词过去式

original.en: I was almost there when a sarcastic voice below said.
original.zh: 我快要到的时候，下面一个讽刺的声音响起。

imitations.en: I was walking home when it started to rain.
imitations.zh: 我正在走路回家时开始下雨了。

imitations.en: He was cooking dinner when the light went out.
imitations.zh: 他正在做晚饭时灯灭了。

original.en: Would you mind coming with me to the station?
original.zh: 你介意跟我去一趟警察局吗？

imitations.en: Would you mind passing me the salt?
Would you mind closing the window?

sentencePatterns.pattern: I prefer to + 动词原形

imitations.en: I prefer to drink coffee in the morning.

original.en: I tried to wake up my wife by ringing the doorbell.
original.zh: 我按门铃试图叫醒我的妻子。

imitations.en: He tried to open the door with his key.
They tried to finish the work before dark.
imitations.zh: 他们试图在天黑前完成工作。
